data.name: Resx.Match
data.comment: Same text as S14 Translation() call — should merge cleanly

data.name: Resx.Conflict
data.comment: Different text from S15 Translation() call — should produce KeyConflict

data.name: Resx.Only
data.value: Only in resx, no code counterpart
data.comment: Passive entry — no Translation() call references this key

data.name: R01.IndexerResolved
data.comment: Compile-time indexer reference — scanner can match this key deterministically

data.name: R03.RuntimeTarget
data.value: You can only reach me at runtime
data.comment: RESX entry exists but R03 code uses a variable key — scanner cannot match

data.name: R04.WithCultures
data.comment: Compile-time indexer reference with culture-specific translations in da/es-MX
